title: Pussy-cat
content:
Pussy-cat sits by the fire;
        How should she be fair?
    In walks the little dog,
        Says "Pussy! are you there?"

    "How do you do, Mistress Pussy?
        Mistress Pussy, how do you do?"
    "I thank you kindly, little dog,
        I fare as well as you!"
meaning:
"Pussy-cat" is a quintessential example of Helen Beatrix Potter's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
